question: What are the realistic financial scenarios for Xinpinmu, and how should investors think about its impact on PDD's valuation?

findings.claim: Anker Innovations (300866.SZ), a Chinese DTC brand company, achieved 44.6% gross margin in 9M2025 and 9.38% operating margin for FY2024, with FY2024 revenue of RMB 24.71B (+41% YoY) and operating income of RMB 2B (+29% YoY)
findings.data: Anker gross profit margin 9M2025: 44.6% (+1.6pp YoY). Operating margin Dec 2025: 9.38% (vs 9.50% end-2024). Net margin: 8.7%. ROE: 12.77%. FY2024 revenue: RMB 24.71B (+41.14% YoY). TTM revenue Q3 2025: RMB 29.28B (+32% YoY). Energy storage segment exploded: RMB 3.02B in 2024 (+184% YoY).

findings.claim: UGREEN (301606.SZ), a Chinese consumer electronics brand, operates at ~37-38% gross margin and ~8-9% operating margin, with FY2024 revenue of RMB 6.17B (+28.5% YoY)
findings.data: UGREEN FY2024 gross margin: 37.4% (-0.2pp YoY). Q1 2025 gross margin: 38.0% (-1.6pp YoY). Operating margin ~8.7% (operating expenses RMB 1.77B vs gross profit RMB 2.31B). Period cost rate: 28.5% (+0.7pp YoY). FY2024 revenue: RMB 6.17B (+28.46% YoY). Net income: RMB 0.462B (+19.29% YoY). Trades at 3.9x EV/Revenue and 40.8x EV/EBITDA.

findings.claim: Xiaomi IoT & lifestyle products achieved 23-25% gross margin in 2025, while smartphone gross margin was only 11.1% due to competition; overall company gross margin hit record 22.9% in Q3 2025
findings.data: Xiaomi Q3 2025 overall gross margin: 22.9% (record, +2.5pp YoY). IoT revenue Q3 2025: RMB 27.6B, gross margin 23.9%. IoT/Internet full-year 2025 gross margin: 23.1% (+2.8pp YoY). Smart EV Q4 2025 gross margin: 25.5%. Internet services gross margin: 76.9%. Mobile phone gross margin only 11.1%. Innovation Business full-year operating profit: RMB 900M (first ever). Full-year 2025 IoT/Internet annual revenue: CNY 123.2B (+18.3%).

findings.claim: Kirkland Signature operates at ~15% markup (Costco's cap), generating 5-8pp higher gross margins than national brands, with approximately $58-90B in annual sales in FY2025
findings.data: Costco caps markups at 14% for non-Signature products and 15% for Kirkland Signature products. Private labels carry gross margins 5-8pp above equivalent national brands. Kirkland generated approximately $58-90B in sales in FY2025 (discrepancy depending on inclusion of gas). Kirkland products represent 23% of total 2024 revenue despite being only 12.5% of SKU assortment. Costco overall gross margin: 10-12%. Net profit margin as of Feb 2026: 2.96%.

findings.claim: Amazon third-party private label sellers typically achieve 30-50% gross margins, with over 54% reporting profit margins above 20%, though rising tariffs (up to 172% on Chinese goods) and FBA fee increases (+6% in 2026) are pressuring margins
findings.data: Private label products generally provide profit margins 30-50%, vs wholesale 10-20%. Over 54% of private label sellers report profit margins above 20%. Amazon PPC costs up 18-25% in 2025. FBA fees increased average 6% in 2026. Baseline tariffs on Chinese goods: 20%, stacking up to 172%. Over 60% of Amazon sellers operate private label businesses (Jungle Scout 2025). Over 800,000 brands enrolled in Amazon Brand Registry in 2026 (+20% YoY).
